params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-27: zeta verify after h2_end_stream fix. ROOT CAUSE FOUND in 606 etap.log: zeta service had h2_end_stream=1 (END_STREAM on HEADERS = no body emit). Other working SSE services (mistral/gamma/perplexity) all have h2_end_stream=2 (body sent then END_STREAM). Fixed UPDATE ai_prompt_services SET h2_end_stream=2, h2_goaway=0 WHERE service_name='zeta'. reload_services OK. Now retry: SSE body should emit fully → EventStream parser reads events → warning text renders.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Open zeta-ai.io and chat with same character
4. Network /v1/rooms/.../messages/stream → EventStream tab → events should now parse (≥2 events: IN_PROGRESS + CHAT_COMPLETE)
5. SUCCESS: warning text rendered in chat bubble
6. PARTIAL: events parse but UI still error → schema field issue (now real)
7. FAIL: still 0 events → other framing issue (rare)

notes: Cycle 94 R-27 zeta verify post h2_end_stream fix (root cause was END_STREAM=1 truncating body).
